description_long: This all-terrain vehicle features a compact, rugged body with a weathered, metallic exterior adorned with colorful graffiti and decals, giving it a distinctly urban, post-apocalyptic aesthetic. The vehicle has a low, wide stance with four visible wheels mounted on robust axles, suggesting stability and off-road capability. The front is equipped with a reinforced bumper and two yellow headlights, while the rear is open, allowing for easy entry and exit. The seating area is surrounded by a protective frame and includes a padded seat, with a U-shaped handlebar for steering. Various pipes and mechanical components are visible along the sides, hinting at a utilitarian, possibly electric or hybrid powertrain. The surface is predominantly hard and matte, with signs of rust, scratches, and grime indicating heavy use in harsh environments.
description: A compact, graffiti-covered all-terrain vehicle with a rugged, metallic body, four wheels, and a U-shaped handlebar, designed for urban and off-road use.
description_view_0: Front view shows the reinforced bumper, two yellow headlights, and the top of the protective frame.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the graffiti artwork, exposed pipes, and the U-shaped handlebar inside the seating area.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the open entry, padded seat, and more graffiti, with the protective frame visible.
description_view_3: Right side view displays additional graffiti, mechanical components, and the side profile of the wheels and axles.
attribute_tire_tread_pattern: The tires have a blocky, all-terrain tread pattern with deep grooves, suitable for both urban surfaces and rough off-road conditions.
